channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Imperagen raises £5 million to use quantum physics, AI on enzyme engineering
item.description: Biotech company Imperagen announced on Thursday a £5 million ($6.7 million) seed round led by PXN Ventures, with participation from IQ Capital and Northern Gritstone.

item.title: In SpaceX’s IPO, Elon Musk is a risk factor
item.description: The SpaceX IPO is here, and it's more than just an historic public offering that could make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire. It also reveals more ways in which Elon Musk's companies interact and overlap with each other, shuffling money around in ways that are often difficult to keep track of. This is evident […]

item.title: Contenus pédopornographiques | Un juge australien inflige une amende au réseau X
item.description: Un juge australien a condamné X Corp., la maison-mère du réseau X, à une amende de 650 000 dollars australiens (635 622 dollars canadiens) jeudi pour avoir omis de fournir en 2023 à l’autorité de surveillance de la sécurité en ligne des informations sur la manière dont elle avait géré les contenus pédopornographiques.

item.title: I've covered EOFY sales for years — these are the only tech deals worth your money right now
item.description: While EOFY deals officially start June 1, some retailers and brands have jumped the gun with laptops, tablets, TVs and more already discounted.
